content:
💡 page-agent | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling users to control web interfaces with natural language, making web applications more accessible and automating complex workflows like form filling and SaaS AI copilot integration.
✨ Key Features: • Easy integration directly in-page JavaScript • No browser extension or headless browser required • Text-based DOM manipulation • Bring your own LLMs
📖 Summary: Page Agent is a JavaScript library that allows users to control web interfaces using natural language. It integrates directly into the webpage, eliminating the need for browser extensions or external tools, and enables text-based DOM manipulation powered by user-provided LLMs.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
